description: A receipt that passes the TypeScript verifier (which only checks receipt_id, type, timestamp) but is rejected by Python (which checks ts, trace_id, principal, decision). This receipt has the wrong field names by spec.

expected_typescript.reason: TS checks only receipt_id, type, timestamp — all present. No other validation.

conformance_requirement: A conforming verifier pair MUST agree on this receipt. Both should reject it as schema-invalid. If TS passes it, INV-01 is violated.
